title: K-200 Propulsion Design Analysis
text:
# K-200 Propulsion Design Analysis

Document number: MD-DOC-451-F. Revision: F. Type: design-note. Author: Jordan Kim. Created: 2023-03-29. Last modified: 2024-01-08. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Propulsion subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1095, P-1041.
